sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Good, the click swapped centers. Now the right green has W center and the left green has c center. Now I need to move the right green to the right frame. The right green is at rows 30-32, cols 27-29. The right frame is at rows 26-30, cols 44-48 (inner at rows 27-29, cols 45-47).
The purple bar is at rows 21-41, cols 33-38. The right green needs to get to cols 45-47, which is to the right of the purple bar.
Looking at the image, I see a gap between the gray areas. The right green is between the left gray area and the purple bar. To get to the right frame, it needs to go around the purple bar somehow.
Let me check: the right frame is at rows 26-30. The purple bar starts at row 21. So the right frame is below the top of the purple bar. But the right frame is at cols 44-48, which is to the right of the purple bar (cols 33-38).
Looking at the image more carefully, I see there's a narrow passage between the gray areas. The gray area on the right seems to extend from around col 39 to 51. The purple bar is at cols 33-38. So there's a gap between the purple bar and the right gray area.
But wait, the right green needs to get from cols 27-29 to cols 45-47. The purple bar is at cols 33-38. So the green needs to pass through cols 33-38.
Let me try moving RIGHT with the right green (which now has W center). If it can pass through the purple bar, great. If not, I need to find another path.
Actually, looking at the image, the purple bar seems to be a solid wall. Let me try moving UP first to see if there's a gap above the purple bar. The purple bar starts at row 21, and the right green is at rows 30-32. Moving UP would move it toward row 21.
Wait, but the right frame is at rows 26-30, which overlaps with the purple bar's rows (21-41). So moving UP won't help get past the purple bar vertically.
Let me try moving RIGHT and see what happens. If the green can't move right because of the purple bar, I'll need to find another approach.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:

<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Right green now has W center at rows 30-32, cols 27-29
# Try moving RIGHT to see if it can pass the purple bar
action(['RIGHT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
